name: Code Companion AI keymaps for Zed

description: Add Code Companion–style space a keymap block: toggle, context menu, inline assists (explain/fix/tests/doc/refactor/review/naming/LSP/commit)

asi.hypothesis: Map Neovim Code Companion leader-a letters to Zed agent:: and assistant::InlineAssist with prefilled prompts
asi.visual_only: e f t d D r R n require visual selection like nvim visual mode
asi.normal_and_visual: a v m l work in normal+visual contexts

description: Add space a s → agent::AddSelectionToThread; extend benchmark checklist (+2)

asi.hypothesis: Agent panel selection shortcut improves workflow beyond inline-only; checklist updated so score reflects s binding

description: space a S: AddSelectionToThread+ToggleFocus sequence; space a g: OpenRulesLibrary

asi.hypothesis: One-key send selection to agent panel; g opens rules/prompt library like Code Companion slash prompts
asi.sequence_caveat: action::Sequence does not wait for async; agent focus may race AddSelection

description: space a N new agent thread; space a o open agent diff review

asi.hypothesis: Thread lifecycle and diff review under same leader prefix as Code Companion chat
asi.letters: N=new thread, o=open diff (not used by other space prefixes)

description: space a b git branch diff review; space a i generic inline assist

asi.hypothesis: Branch review via git::ReviewDiff matches Code Companion review workflows; i is blank inline assist like ctrl-enter
asi.note: b not in space g/b conflict — space a b vs space g b

description: space a p/h/G profiles, review comments→agent, global AGENTS.md; score space a c in checklist

asi.hypothesis: Agent tooling under leader-a: profiles, editor review→agent, global rules file
asi.checklist_note: space a c weighted +1 (was uncounted); no duplicate keys across blocks

description: space a P project AGENTS.md; space a / model selector; space a w follow agent

asi.hypothesis: Project rules + model picker + follow complete daily agent panel ergonomics under leader-a
asi.conflict_check: space a / distinct from editor space / (project search in normal-only block)

description: space a u/j/x settings, external thread, thread markdown; space a E explain in normal+visual

asi.hypothesis: External agent + settings + export; E mirrors visual e for cursor/line without duplicating e in two blocks

description: space a F/T fix+tests normal+visual; space a k profile selector; space a y git AI commit

asi.hypothesis: Uppercase F/T parallel E for cursor-line workflows; k/y are agent profile + native git commit AI
asi.visual_lowercase: e f t still visual-only; F T E in shared block

description: space a q agent chat; O/Q/z refactor review naming normal+visual

asi.hypothesis: Complete uppercase normal+visual parity for r/R/n Code Companion letters; q starts agent chat

description: space a J/L inline doc normal+visual; ; terminal thread; , thinking mode

asi.hypothesis: J/L pair with d/D for cursor-line doc; semicolon/comma are unused leader-a slots for agent modes
asi.letter_clash: j=external agent, l=LSP diagnostic; J/L are doc assists

description: space a . options menu; B ReviewBranchDiff; - cycle favorite models

asi.hypothesis: Agent branch review B complements git b; dot/hyphen for model UX
asi.b_vs_B: space a b=git::ReviewDiff, space a B=agent::ReviewBranchDiff

description: space a =/%/+ model UX; ]/[ keep/reject agent hunks

asi.hypothesis: Review workflow keep/reject under leader-a; model toggles pair with - and ,

description: space a >/< keep/reject all; '/` cycle inline assists; fix autoresearch.sh backtick in heredoc

asi.hypothesis: Bulk review + inline model cycling; autoresearch used unicode backtick in checks to avoid bash command substitution

description: space a U undo reject; ~ cycle mode; README regen from keymap

asi.hypothesis: Safety net after reject + session mode cycling; includes prior iter14 keymap if uncommitted
